message.entry: Parent property must be a valid graphics object.
DataArgumentPatterns must be a cell array of patterns containing cellstrs.
One or more data argument patterns specified are ambiguous.
Type information is not specified for the property ''{0}''.
Leading flags must be a cellstr or a string array.
Invalid ChartClassName. Specify the full package name of the chart class.
{0} cannot be reassigned. Consider instantiating a new ChartInputParser object.
Trailing flags must be specified as a struct, cellstr or string array.
LineSpecification must be a struct with at most three fields corresponding to LineStyle, MarkerStyle and Color.
Repeated {0} mapping in LineSpecification. Overwriting previously set value.
